_comment: This repo is a monorepo; the Next.js console lives in apps/web.
Vercel's Root Directory is a PROJECT SETTING (not a vercel.json key) and
Vercel only reads vercel.json from inside the configured root directory.
So this file is documentation only — the live config is apps/web/vercel.json.
1. Vercel project -> Settings -> General -> Root Directory = apps/web
A platform 404 at '/' means step 1 was not applied (Vercel built from the
repo root and found no Next.js app).
